description: You are an Information Architect working on a platform migration for 'Summit Outdoor Gear'. Create a 'Target State' hierarchical sitemap diagram starting with 'Home' based on the audit data in ~/Desktop/site_audit_data.csv and the migration rules in ~/Desktop/migration_strategy_brief.txt. The sitemap must exclude pages with fewer than 100 monthly views unless they are core utility pages (e.g., Contact, Returns). Apply the following color coding to the diagram elements: Blue (#dae8fc) for retained pages, Green (#d5e8d4) for new pages, and Orange (#ffe6cc) for consolidated or redirected pages (labeled with the new URL). Save the diagram to ~/Diagrams/sitemap_architecture.drawio and export it as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/exports/sitemap.pdf.
